name: io.github.fgasparetto/voice-transcriber-mcp
title: Voice Transcriber MCP Server
description: MCP server for transcribing Google Chat voice messages using Groq Whisper API

environmentVariables.name: GROQ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Groq API key for Whisper transcription (free at console.groq.com)

environmentVariables.name: GCHAT_TOKEN_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to Google Chat OAuth2 token.json
